category_sources: source_facts.description says Development kit for the Java programming language; OpenJDK homepage identifies the OpenJDK project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openjdk; source_facts.homepage is https://openjdk.org/.
docs_sources: Official OpenJDK Developers' Guide is hosted on openjdk.org; Java SE API and tool documentation is hosted by Oracle for Java SE.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/openjdk/jdk26u, so repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list Java development tools including java, javac, javadoc, jar, and jshell.
